search_queries_used: site:asahq.org postanesthesia care circulation monitoring recovery record
site:doh.gov.ae day surgery recovery hemodynamic monitoring
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic management or dose instructions for PACU hemodynamic observation documentation
generic anesthesia landing pages without an exact section for PACU hemodynamic observation documentation
rejection_reasons: Thresholds, interpretation, and treatment require live clinical context.
The candidate source category "vasopressor dose protocols" did not provide exact documentation-only evidence for this workflow and was not mapped.
Autonomous management, medication, dose, procedure, escalation, or discharge instructions were outside the documentation-only scope.
Landing pages and search snippets were not accepted as exact evidence.
population_applicability: Patients recovering in PACU or equivalent after anesthesia care.
setting_applicability: Direct for circulation observation and record documentation; diagnosis and management are outside scope.
UAE_applicability: International ASA evidence supported by DoH recovery standards; local monitoring policy remains required.
recency_verification: Current ASA 2024 and DoH V1/2024 standards were reviewed on 2026-07-13.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA standard supports continual circulation and recovery evaluation with observations entered into the recovery record; it does not interpret values or direct treatment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documented oxygenation, ventilation, circulation, consciousness, temperature, pain or other recovery observations, and use of a recovery score where appropriate.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA preanesthesia documentation section supports risk, airway, cardiorespiratory, reviewed-investigation, consultation, plan, and consent fields for PACU hemodynamic observation documentation; each remains clinician-entered and conditional on assessment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

unresolved_source_gaps: Blood pressure, pulse, rhythm, perfusion values, baseline comparison, trend, cause, intervention, response, and escalation remain unsupported unless clinician-entered.
Legacy duration presets, broad generic interval-history wording, and any content not explicitly mapped to an exact section remain unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No source mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, anesthesia plan, investigation, procedure, medication, dose, referral, discharge decision, or urgency conclusion.
UAE facility policy, credentialing, pathway, and qualified anesthesiologist review remain required before use.
